name: Minimal Mono
tagline: Pure black and white with one electric-blue accent — aggressive whitespace, zero chrome, brutalist-clean.
audience: Solo developers, opinionated designers, photographers wanting zero chrome, manifesto sites, single-voice indie projects

typography.display: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
typography.body: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
typography.mono: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
